title: Moss Creepers
description: Updated Creeper Textures to fit the Jappa style
body:
# Moss Creepers

Creepers finally get their texture updated! Utilizing the moss texture and just a little bit of shading, the Creeper now looks right at home alongside modern Jappa textures.

Originally uploaded to Planet Minecraft in 2020, this pack has recieved a facelift and is now available on Modrinth!

![Creepers in a Lush Cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PStGD8hX/images/180e3aafb80e448085e8c4d9a6e4d0d65ad8d458.png)
